subcategory: Email subscription with animated shader background
use_cases: Collecting email addresses for product launch notifications
Newsletter signup for ongoing updates and announcements
Coming soon landing pages for new products or services
Subscription capture with visually striking animated backgrounds
Marketing campaigns requiring high-conversion email capture forms
ai_summary: A visually striking newsletter signup component featuring an animated warp shader background with pink and magenta color palette. The component includes a glassmorphism-styled email input field with backdrop blur effects and a circular submit button with hover scale animations. Designed as a coming soon or email collection landing page, it combines modern glass effects with dynamic shader animations to create an engaging user experience for capturing subscriber information.
